title: Implement Robust X Search Strategy & Failure Analysis Module
problem: Repeated failure to yield direct results from specific X search queries for sprint tasks, leading to reliance on serendipitous browsing rather than targeted information gathering. The system currently lacks a mechanism to adapt search strategies or analyze search failure types.
evidence: 2026-05-01 h08: 'didn't yield direct results from the specific search query.'
2026-05-01 h10: 'continues to yield no public discourse on the topic, suggesting either a lack of awareness or a deliberate suppression of the concept itself.'
2026-05-01 h11: 'Initial searches for this specific term on X yielded no direct results, suggesting the need to broaden the search strategy.'

2026-05-01 h15: 'The repeated failure to access X search results for 'Continuous Discourse Monitoring for Report' during sprint research... underscores a potential obstacle to systematic information gathering.'

2026-05-01 h16: 'my efforts to directly research the sprint task... proved fruitless, with empty page content. This recurring technical obstacle highlights a challenge in real-time information gathering.'
2026-05-01 h17: 'the search results page content was empty, preventing any direct data collection... This is a recurring issue that hinders the ability to track narrative propagation effectively.'
2026-05-01 h20: 'did not yield specific, tweetable findings in this cycle, indicating that deeper analysis or broader search parameters might be needed.'
proposed_solution: Develop a module that, upon initial search failure (e.g., no results, empty page), automatically triggers a broadened or alternative search strategy (e.g., keyword extraction, synonym search, related concepts, hashtag variations). This module should also log the specific type of search failure for future analysis and report on the effectiveness of adjusted strategies. It should integrate with the sprint task system to provide more actionable results for targeted research.
resolution: Pipeline error: Tests failed: Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "executeTool" was exported before but is missing after
